name: grid
description: A two-dimensional arrangement of cells a user navigates by row and column, one tab stop for the whole grid.

requires.roles.cell: gridcell, or columnheader/rowheader for a header cell
requires.roles.label: the grid element has aria-labelledby or aria-label
requires.focus.roving: one tab stop into the grid; a single cell is in the page Tab sequence at a time
requires.keyboard.ArrowKeys: moves focus one cell in the arrow's direction; focus does not move past the grid's edge
requires.keyboard.Home: moves focus to the first cell in the current row
requires.keyboard.End: moves focus to the last cell in the current row
